proposed_relations.description: Offset bus lanes are a proposed SBS treatment on 125th Street for the M60 SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset bus lanes benefit all buses on corridor, and maintain needed parking
Offset Bus Lanes replace one general travel lane in each direction and maintain curb access

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation to CB9 (2013-03-07). Block p006_c0009 explicitly lists offset bus lanes as a potential improvement for the M60 SBS project, and p011_c0004 describes the proposed design.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Offset bus lanes benefit all buses on corridor, and maintain needed parking
Offset Bus Lanes replace one general travel lane in each direction and maintain curb access

proposed_relations.description: Off-board fare collection is a proposed SBS treatment for the M60 SBS on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Pay at sidewalk Metrocard or coin machines before boarding the bus 2. Take your receipt 3. Board the bus through any of the three doors

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation. Block p006_c0008 lists off-board fare collection as a potential improvement. Block p007_c0007 explains how SBS fare payment works.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Pay at sidewalk Metrocard or coin machines before boarding the bus 2. Take your receipt 3. Board the bus through any of the three doors

proposed_relations.description: Transit Signal Priority is a proposed SBS treatment for the M60 SBS project on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority reduces time stopped at red lights

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation. Block p006_c0011 explicitly lists transit signal priority as a potential improvement for the M60 SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority reduces time stopped at red lights

proposed_relations.description: Limited stops is a proposed SBS treatment for the M60 SBS project on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 SBS makes limited stops in Manhattan and Queens Bx15, M100 and M101 make local stops along 125 th Street

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation. Block p006_c0007 lists limited stops as a potential improvement. Block p013_c0005 explicitly ties limited stops to the M60 SBS service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 SBS makes limited stops in Manhattan and Queens Bx15, M100 and M101 make local stops along 125 th Street

proposed_relations.description: Curb extensions at Amsterdam Avenue are proposed as part of the M60 SBS project on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Curb extensions on SW and NE corners would reduce crossing distances

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation. Block p023_c0005 is in a section titled 'Proposed Curb Extensions at Amsterdam Av' and explicitly proposes curb extensions as part of the 125th Street SBS project design.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Curb extensions on SW and NE corners would reduce crossing distances

proposed_relations.description: Pedestrian safety improvements are a proposed SBS treatment for the M60 SBS project on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian Safety Improvements at key intersections

decisions.rationale: Source is M60 SBS presentation. Block p006_c0012 explicitly lists pedestrian safety improvements as a potential improvement under 'Select Bus Service on the M60'.
